observable_signals: Repeated tenant / provider reuse across otherwise distinct accounts
Abuse of productivity suites, CDNs, cloud storage, or contractor tooling
Narrative bursts shortly after credential exposure or account takeover events
bot_infra_trends.title: Living-off-the-land influence infrastructure
bot_infra_trends.why_now: More operations will ride on trusted SaaS, enterprise tooling, cloud identities, and legitimate collaboration channels instead of bespoke malware-only stacks.

observable_signals: Impossible travel
Abrupt topic pivots on aged accounts
Style drift with preserved account social graph
Synchronized 'legit-looking' engagement rings
bot_infra_trends.title: Synthetic identity + rented-account operations
bot_infra_trends.why_now: More campaigns will use AI-enhanced personas, bought or rented accounts, and blended human/bot posting to avoid old bot heuristics.

observable_signals: Semantically equivalent claims crossing languages with low lexical overlap
Common citation skeletons and rhetorical templates
Time-lagged cascades from fringe channels to mainstream platforms
bot_infra_trends.title: Multilingual narrative laundering
bot_infra_trends.why_now: Operators will seed in one language, repackage in another, and re-import narratives with localized style.

observable_signals: Correlation between intrusion telemetry and narrative escalation
Same victim set appearing in both phishing and influence datasets
Campaign pivots after sanctions, elections, or kinetic events
bot_infra_trends.title: Cyber + influence coupling as default, not exception
bot_infra_trends.why_now: Intrusion, credential theft, and influence amplification will increasingly share infrastructure and timing windows.

observable_signals: Prioritize account-role inference
Surface driver / broker / amplifier nodes
Retain temporal edge semantics
detection_methods.title: Graph foundation models for IO-driver discovery
detection_methods.why_now: IOHunter is squarely on Summit’s target line: uncovering the accounts that orchestrate campaigns, not merely classifying content.

observable_signals: Keep graph features first-class
Use LLMs for embedding / explanation / weak labeling
Do not let pure text classification dominate campaign scoring
detection_methods.title: Topology + language-embedding fusion
detection_methods.why_now: Aletheia explicitly combines topological features with language embeddings for detection and forecasting.

observable_signals: Add benchmark adapters early
Require out-of-domain generalization tests
Track calibration, not just F1
detection_methods.title: Text-attributed graph benchmarks for misinformation
detection_methods.why_now: TAGFN and TAG-AD indicate the benchmark ecosystem is finally catching up to graph+LLM detection for fake news and misinformation.

observable_signals: Use LLMs as triage, explanation, and labeling assistants
Keep final detection grounded in propagation, account behavior, and infra reuse
detection_methods.title: LLM-assisted influence-campaign classification
detection_methods.why_now: Growing work on using LLMs directly for campaign detection, often with metadata and network features.

observable_signals: Plan for image/video nodes in the graph
Add 'claim package' objects, not just posts
detection_methods.title: Evidence-grounded multimodal graph methods
detection_methods.why_now: Multimodal misinformation work is converging on graph-based evidence consistency.

observable_signals: New datasets in English, Arabic, Chinese, Russian
Explainable authorship methods
Machine-generated text fingerprinting that survives paraphrase
Benchmarks usable for cross-language attribution
research_programs.title: IARPA HIATUS
research_programs.why_now: Directly aimed at authorship attribution, author privacy, and machine-generated text detection.

observable_signals: Formal cognitive-attack threat models
Measurable operator-deception scenarios
Machine-verifiable assurance cases for human-facing systems
research_programs.title: DARPA ICS (Intrinsic Cognitive Security)
research_programs.why_now: One of the clearest official 'cognitive attack' programs.

observable_signals: DECIPHER / LocUS / related releases
Decision-support methods for sparse, ambiguous environments
Effect-measurement programs, not just detection programs
research_programs.title: IARPA human-systems portfolio around social influence / decision-making
research_programs.why_now: Includes social influence, behavior change, and decision-making.

observable_signals: New quarterly misuse typologies
Traces of model-to-platform handoff
Repeated TTPs across vendors
research_programs.title: Platform/provider threat-intelligence programs as quasi-research pipelines
research_programs.why_now: Functionally part of the research surface because they see misuse telemetry others do not.
